scripts.build: bun run build:ui && bun run embed:ui && bun run build:server
scripts.compile: bun run build:ui && bun run embed:ui && bun build --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun server/src/main.ts --outfile bin/kapsis-dashboard
scripts.compile:darwin-arm64: bun run build && bun build --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-darwin-arm64 server/src/main.ts --outfile bin/kapsis-dashboard-darwin-arm64
scripts.compile:darwin-x64: bun run build && bun build --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-darwin-x64 server/src/main.ts --outfile bin/kapsis-dashboard-darwin-x64
scripts.compile:linux-arm64: bun run build && bun build --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-linux-arm64 server/src/main.ts --outfile bin/kapsis-dashboard-linux-arm64
scripts.compile:linux-x64: bun run build && bun build --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-linux-x64 server/src/main.ts --outfile bin/kapsis-dashboard-linux-x64
